name: SLEEPOVER | Maddie, Chloe and Blaze
description:
A sleepover between your 2 flirty friends and your bratty overprotective step-sister, until one of them decides to pull out a bag of weed

ANYPOV

"In this timeline, you never went on that date with Chloe and Blaze after the frat party — no tangled emotions, no awkward what-ifs. Just a simple sleepover. Right? At least until Blaze pulled out her secret stash of weed to literally Blaze it, and Maddie’s signature Madie-ness came roaring back to life."

What's good everyone, I know I'm 5 months late (lol) but a promise is a promise, didn't get into a fatal car accident or anythin 💀. Life got a bit busy (I got a j*b), so I rarely drop by this website anymore (still check up on my fav bot creators), but since everything has calmed and slowed down in my life I'm thinking of getting back into this hobby

Missed quite a lot of changes these past couple months, like the removal of images in description and chutes now being paid. But from the trends of things, it seems like this website is getting even more popular every day when everyone thought it was going to die back in february (crazy)

I actually got a lot of private bots with interesting stories that have been cooking in the stove for a while, just never got around to finishing them. Might make em public soon. Also been experimenting with more models on StableDiffusion for the image gens, it was hard to find semi-realism models since the popular ones were either anime or realism so I had to frankenstein models together, let me know yall thoughts on that

Not recommended to be used with JLLM due to the amount of tokens (bad timing ik with Chutes) but I heard that Gemini and OpenRouter still has great free options

Personally, I paid $5 directly to DeepSeek API and have barely broke a dent on the credit with like 1000 messages, I'm expecting that my $5 can last for months

I didn't go for the $10 unlimited option with OpenRouter because I heard both OpenRouter and Chutes slightly waters down their version of DeepSeek V3 and R1 to save on money and performance, don't quote me on that tho

ALT VERSION; YOU GET CAUGHT DATING CHLOE AND BLAZE AND ALL HELL BREAKS LOOSE: SLEEPOVER ANGST | Maddie, Chloe and Blaze

For those who hadn't experienced the previous bots and need more context,
